mechanism_narrative: A sustained decline in the federal funds rate reduces the discount rate applied to future corporate earnings, directly compressing equity valuation multiples and generating positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: Walk-forward Rank IC remains below 0.03 over any 2-year rolling window, or 20-day forward returns in easing periods are not significantly higher than baseline (t-test p > 0.05).

mechanism_narrative: A rapid deterioration in labor market conditions triggers risk-off positioning as investors price in higher recession probabilities, causing immediate negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 5 trading days.
candidate_trigger: UNRATE rises > 0.3 percentage points within 30 calendar days
failure_condition: SPX produces positive 5-day returns in > 60% of triggered instances despite the unemployment spike, or the signal shows no predictive power in post-2000 data.

mechanism_narrative: Simultaneous strength in industrial production and housing starts signals robust aggregate demand outpacing supply constraints, driving corporate revenue growth expectations and yielding positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 60 trading days.
failure_condition: The joint signal fails to outperform a buy-and-hold benchmark in forward 60-day returns during periods of stable macro growth, or the interaction term coefficient becomes statistically insignificant (p > 0.10).

mechanism_narrative: When the federal funds rate exceeds the inflation rate, real borrowing costs turn positive and constrain corporate leverage, suppressing equity valuations and producing negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: SPX forward returns remain positive or neutral when real rates are deeply negative, or the historical correlation between real rates and equity returns flips sign during the specified regime.

mechanism_narrative: Rising retail sales volume indicates expanding consumer spending power, which directly boosts near-term corporate earnings guidance and drives positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 5 trading days.
failure_condition: The signal exhibits a negative or zero rank correlation with 5-day forward returns across multiple decades, or retail sales growth decouples from equity performance during structural demand shocks.

mechanism_narrative: A sustained contraction in industrial production below its 12-month moving average signals weakening manufacturing demand, which compresses profit margins and generates negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 60 trading days.
candidate_trigger: INDPRO falls below its 12-month rolling mean
failure_condition: Industrial production declines do not precede equity drawdowns in more than 50% of historical instances, or the signal generates false positives during supply-side disruptions rather than demand contractions.

mechanism_narrative: Concurrent growth in total nonfarm payrolls and real GDP expansion confirms a self-reinforcing economic cycle, reducing equity risk premiums and producing positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: The joint signal fails to predict positive returns when labor and output growth diverge, or the interaction effect vanishes during periods of productivity-led growth without wage expansion.

mechanism_narrative: During periods of elevated inflation, a sharp decline in housing starts acts as a leading indicator of credit market stress, triggering immediate risk aversion and negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 5 trading days.
failure_condition: Housing starts declines fail to predict equity drawdowns when inflation is anchored, or the signal produces positive returns during the specified inflation regime.
